changelog: Fixed: Notification volume slider now actually boosts notification sound volume on Android — PCM audio data is amplified by the volume multiplier when writing the sound file.
Fixed: Web preview for custom notification sounds now correctly plays audio at boosted volumes (>100%) — HTML audio element volume cap bypassed by amplifying PCM samples before playback.
Fixed: Notification channel migration version bumped so existing users get a fresh channel recreation on first launch after update.
